annual_rate.notes: Idaho general/contract prejudgment interest is 12% simple (Idaho Code §28-22-104(1)). SEPARATELY, in tort actions for personal injury, property damage, or wrongful death where the claimant serves an offer of settlement, prejudgment interest accrues at the §28-22-104(2) variable rate (currently 8.875%) under §12-301 — not the 12% general rate. Verified 2026-07-11. Not legal advice.

Idaho general/contract prejudgment interest is 12% simple (Idaho Code §28-22-104(1)). SEPARATELY, in tort actions for personal injury, property damage, or wrongful death where the claimant serves an offer of settlement, prejudgment interest accrues at the §28-22-104(2) variable rate (currently 8.875%) under §12-301 — not the 12% general rate. Verified 2026-07-11. Not legal advice.
